Description:

ChangeLog: https://github.com/pauldreik/rdfind/blob/releases/1.6.0/ChangeLog

* support for sha512
* fix build failures for gcc 11, 12 and 13

* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.2-RELEASE, amd64)
